response.justification: The candidate is a strong hands-on senior full-stack engineer with roughly 18 years of experience, meeting the raw tenure minimum, but the role calls for a Director-level individual contributor with recognized AI expertise and cloud/AI platform strategy leadership. His AI exposure is recent and tooling-oriented (MCP code generators, agentic workflow support since 2025) rather than demonstrated AI products or platforms, his career trajectory tops out at Senior/Staff engineer without evidence of org-level technical strategy, advising strategic customers, or influencing product direction at scale, and there is no advanced degree in an AI-related field. He would be a credible senior IC hire elsewhere, but not for a principal AI-strategy mandate.
strengths: 18+ years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput backend systems
Genuine builder credentials: founder of an open-source geo-data platform, multiple libraries, conference talks and workshops
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
concerns: No demonstrated AI products, platforms, or recognized AI expertise commensurate with a Principal/Director-level AI strategy role
Career level plateaus at Senior/Staff with no evidence of strategic leadership, customer advisory, or cross-org influence
Limited cloud platform strategy depth; cloud experience is applied (AWS CDK, Kubernetes) rather than architectural or product-defining, and there is an unexplained employment gap in 2020

key_factors.factor: Seniority mismatch for Director-level IC scope
Shallow and recent AI track record
